title: Special Education Classroom Aide
description:
Special Education Classroom Aide
2025-2026 School Year

Compensation: Hourly
Education/Degree: High School Diploma or equivalent
Job Goal: The classroom educational aide will function as the assistant to the intervention
specialist and the general education teacher in order to facilitate the implementation of the IEP
within small groups and individual settings. The classroom educational aide will assist the
teacher in meeting program goals.

General Qualifications:
* Favorable BCI/FBI background checks
* Complies with drug free workplace rules and board policies
* Excellent communication and organizational skills
* Demonstrates aptitude and knowledge of the position's demands
* Willingness to obtain Educational Aide license

Job Specific Qualifications Description:
* Desire and dedication to work with students individually or in small groups and provide
Instructional support for the classroom teacher.
* Willingness to engage in learning and professional development opportunities.
* Must be personable and able to work well with staff, students, and parents.
* Willingness to perform other specific job-related duties as directed by building or district
administration.

Interested applicants should send application, resume, and credentials to :
Kim Martig
k.martig@polandschools.org
Poland Board of Education Office
3030 Dobbins Road
Poland, Ohio 44514
(330) 757-7000

title: SUBSTITUTE Special Education Aide
description:
SUBSTITUTE Special Education Aide
Multiple Positions (McKinley Elementary, Poland Middle School, Poland High School)
2025-2026 School Year

Compensation: Hourly
Education/Degree: High School Diploma or equivalent
Job Goal: The substitute classroom educational aide will function as the assistant to the
intervention specialist and the general education teacher in the absence of the classroom aide
in order to facilitate the implementation of the IEP within small groups and individual settings.

General Qualifications:
* Favorable BCI/FBI background checks
* Complies with drug free workplace rules and board policies
* Excellent communication and organizational skills
* Demonstrates aptitude and knowledge of the position's demands
* Willingness to obtain Educational Aide license

Job Specific Qualifications Description:
* Desire and dedication to work with students individually or in small groups and provide
Instructional support for the classroom teacher.
* Must be personable and able to work well with staff and students

Interested applicants should send application, resume, and credentials to :
Kim Martig
k.martig@polandschools.org
Poland Board of Education Office
3030 Dobbins Road
Poland, Ohio 44514
(330) 757-7000

title: Intervention Specialist
description:
Positions Open for Poland:
Intervention Specialist Grades K-3 Location: McKinley Elementary
Intervention Specialist Grades 7-12 Location: Poland Seminary High School

• Work under the supervision of the Director of Special Education & Building Principal in providing
services to children with disabilities and other at risk students.
• Ability to perform work in accordance with job description.
• Licensure: Holds Intervention Specialist licensure, Mild/Moderate Special Education certification
• Successful BCI & FBI background checks.
Posting will end when positions are filled.

All interested applicants should send a resume and letter of interest to:
Atommelleo@polandschools.org
or to:
Dr. Andrew Tommelleo
Superintendent
3030 Dobbins Rd.
Poland, Ohio 44514

title: Van/Bus Special Education Aide
description:
Van/Bus Special Education Aide
2025-2026 School Year

Compensation: Hourly
Education/Degree: High School Diploma or equivalent
Job Goal: The bus/van special education aide will assist the bus driver with maintaining safe
and comfortable transportation for assigned students to and from designated stops.

General Qualifications:
* Favorable BCI/FBI background checks
* Complies with drug free workplace rules and board policies
* Excellent communication and organizational skills
* Demonstrates aptitude and knowledge of the position's demands
* Willingness to obtain Educational Aide license

Job Specific Qualifications Description:
* Desire and dedication to work with students with disabilities.
* Must be personable and able to communicate well with driver and students
* Willingness to assist the driver to ensure safety of students
* Must be able to assist the driver in operation of wheelchair lift

Interested applicants should send application, resume, and credentials to :
Kim Martig
k.martig@polandschools.org
Poland Board of Education Office
3030 Dobbins Road
Poland, Ohio 44514
(330) 757-7000

title: Bus Driver
description:
POLAND LOCAL SCHOOLS
 5/14/2025
 PERSONNEL VACANCIES

 Positions Open for Poland:
 3 - Bus Driver Positions Open
 Minimum 4 hours per day
 Qualifications: A Valid License depending on position from Ohio

 Valid Ohio Class B CDL with School Bus and Passenger

 Endorsements
 BCI+FBI background checks

 Salary: $19.00 - $20.25 per hour. Depending on experience
 POSTING ENDS: When positions are filled

 Candidates interested must complete fillable Classified Employment online application at www.polandbulldogs.com under Employment dropdown and submit application and resume to:

 Megan Roemer
